name: Local Beginner Java ITS Policy

cold_start.assumption: A newly registered learner starts at difficulty 1.

target_success_probability.rationale: The trained model still ranks same-difficulty candidates so practice stays achievable but not too easy.

session_rules.anti_repetition: Previously answered question IDs are excluded for the logged-in user.

topic_choice: Learner can practice a selected topic or mixed random practice.
